Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (e.g. a new resource service or method)
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Breaking change (changes the public API — see `docs/versioning.md`)

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (Biome)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (Vitest)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds (tsup)
- [ ] New/changed types stay faithful to `docs/openapi.yaml` (camelCase↔snake_case mappers updated)
- [ ] Exported APIs have doc comments
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/`) if behavior or usage changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG `[Unreleased]` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or tenant data committed
